event: View of St. Catherine's Church in Vilnius
symbols: church towers rising above rooftops — the aspiration of the sacred above the mundane, the Church as beacon in the city
red tile roofs — the domestic world of the city gathered around the house of God
description: A watercolor or pastel depiction of an urban view looking toward a white baroque church with twin ornate towers. The church rises above surrounding buildings with red-tiled rooftops and weathered plaster walls in earthy tones. The foreground shows lower buildings and an archway. The sky is pale with soft clouds. The overall palette is warm with ochres, terracotta reds, and creamy whites.
